title: Venezuelan Breakfast Sandwich
description: A delicious Venezuelan-inspired breakfast sandwich filled with crispy bread and savory ingredients.

ingredients.name: Arepa
ingredients.notes: Pre-cooked arepas can be used for this recipe

ingredients.name: Cheese
ingredients.notes: Venezuelan cheese, such as Queso Blanco or Queso Fresco, works well

ingredients.name: Avocado
ingredients.notes: Mash or slice the avocado for added creaminess

ingredients.name: Tomato
ingredients.notes: Fresh and ripe tomatoes are best

ingredients.name: Ham
ingredients.notes: Diced ham or chorizo can be used for added flavor

instructions: 1. Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
2. Split the arepa in half horizontally to create a sandwich bun.
3. Top the bottom half of the arepa with cheese, sliced avocado, tomato, and ham.
4. Place the top half of the arepa on the sandwich.
5. Cook the sandwich in the skillet for 2-3 minutes, until the cheese is melted and the bread is crispy.
6. Flip the sandwich over and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the other side is crispy.
7. Serve the sandwich hot and enjoy!
